name: supplication
label: Supplication
gloss: A persecuted protagonist begs a powerful figure to grant safety

name: deliverance
label: Deliverance
gloss: A protagonist saves an unfortunate from a persecutor

name: vengeance
label: Crime Pursued by Vengeance
gloss: An avenger pursues a criminal for a transgression

name: kin_vengeance
label: Vengeance Taken for Kin upon Kin
gloss: A relative avenges another relative against a guilty kinsman

name: pursuit
label: Pursuit
gloss: A fugitive flees a punishment they may or may not deserve

name: disaster
label: Disaster
gloss: A power is overthrown by the catastrophe of a victorious enemy or fate

name: cruelty_misfortune
label: Falling Prey to Cruelty or Misfortune
gloss: An unfortunate is degraded by an unfeeling master or sudden catastrophe

name: revolt
label: Revolt
gloss: A tyrant is overthrown by a conspirator or an oppressed multitude

name: daring_enterprise
label: Daring Enterprise
gloss: A bold leader undertakes a risky operation against an adversary or an obstacle

name: abduction
label: Abduction
gloss: An abductor takes a victim from a guardian

name: enigma
label: The Enigma
gloss: A protagonist must solve a riddle imposed by an interrogator at the cost of their life or another stake

name: obtaining
label: Obtaining
gloss: A solicitor must acquire something from an adversary by guile or force

name: enmity_kin
label: Enmity of Kin
gloss: A malevolent kinsman opposes a hated kinsman to the death

name: rivalry_kin
label: Rivalry of Kin
gloss: Two kin compete for the same prize creating a fatal rivalry

name: murderous_adultery
label: Murderous Adultery
gloss: Two adulterous lovers betray and kill the wronged spouse

name: madness
label: Madness
gloss: A protagonist commits crimes or destruction while seized by insanity

name: fatal_imprudence
label: Fatal Imprudence
gloss: A reckless protagonist destroys themselves or a loved one through carelessness

name: involuntary_crimes_love
label: Involuntary Crimes of Love
gloss: A lover unknowingly enters incest or a forbidden union

name: slaying_unrecognized
label: Slaying of a Kinsman Unrecognized
gloss: A protagonist kills a kinsman they did not recognize

name: sacrifice_ideal
label: Self-Sacrifice for an Ideal
gloss: A protagonist surrenders happiness or life for a creed or principle

name: sacrifice_kin
label: Self-Sacrifice for Kin
gloss: A protagonist surrenders happiness or life to save a relative

name: passion_sacrifice
label: All Sacrificed for Passion
gloss: A protagonist abandons everything for an overwhelming desire

name: necessity_sacrifice
label: Necessity of Sacrificing Loved Ones
gloss: A protagonist must sacrifice a loved one to save many

name: superior_inferior
label: Rivalry Between Superior and Inferior
gloss: An inferior contends with a superior for the same prize

name: adultery
label: Adultery
gloss: Two lovers betray a spouse but do not commit murder

name: crimes_love
label: Crimes of Love
gloss: A lover commits taboo or transgressive love such as incestuous love

name: discovery_dishonor
label: Discovery of the Dishonor of a Loved One
gloss: A protagonist learns a beloved has done something dishonorable

name: obstacles_love
label: Obstacles to Love
gloss: External barriers (class family law) prevent two lovers from uniting

name: enemy_loved
label: An Enemy Loved
gloss: A lover is also an enemy of the protagonist's kin or cause

name: ambition
label: Ambition
gloss: An ambitious protagonist climbs against rivals and obstacles

name: conflict_god
label: Conflict with a God
gloss: A mortal challenges a god or a divine principle

name: mistaken_jealousy
label: Mistaken Jealousy
gloss: A protagonist's jealousy is provoked by false evidence

name: erroneous_judgment
label: Erroneous Judgment
gloss: A protagonist condemns the wrong party out of ignorance or bias

name: remorse
label: Remorse
gloss: A protagonist suffers conscience pangs over a hidden or revealed crime

name: recovery_lost
label: Recovery of a Lost One
gloss: A protagonist seeks and finds a lost beloved or relative

name: loss_loved
label: Loss of Loved Ones
gloss: A protagonist witnesses the death of beloved companions
